reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente a YPF, o las Empresas que manejan esto, le importa más vender que pensar en quienes diariamente cargamos combustible en cualquier Provincia del resto del Pais. Tendría que haber un CUPO para que los Argentinos tengamos prioridad. LAMENTABLE YPF !!!

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, YPF, or the companies that manage this, care more about selling than about those of us who fill up our tanks every day in any province across the country. There should be a quota system so that Argentinians have priority. Shame on you, YPF!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtLWNyeGVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Es una vergüenza 2 hs para cargar NAFTA por encima no hace falta que les cuenten el calor que hace en puerto Iguazú....

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace, it takes two hours to fill up with gas, and on top of that, you don't need to be told how hot it is in Puerto Iguazú....

reviews.comment:
Por ser un ACA deja mucho que desear, el desayuno muy precario, el despacho de combustible es por horario, llevo 5 horas esperando en una fila. Mal servicio

(Translated by Google)
For an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), it leaves much to be desired. The breakfast is very basic, fuel is dispensed on a schedule, and I've been waiting in line for 5 hours. Poor service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtanViRnN3RRAB
